query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_recommendations` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `type` ENUM('content','playlist','channel','track') DEFAULT 'content',
  `item_id` INT,
  `item_type` VARCHAR(100),
  `score` DECIMAL(5,4) DEFAULT 0,
  `reason` TEXT,
  `is_active` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `approved` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `clicked` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `engaged` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `audio_playback_history` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `content_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `played_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `duration_played` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `completed` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `source` VARCHAR(100),
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `audio_content` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `artist` VARCHAR(255),
  `album` VARCHAR(255),
  `genre` VARCHAR(100),
  `duration` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `file_url` TEXT,
  `cover_url` TEXT,
  `type` ENUM('music','podcast','audiobook','ambient','frequency') DEFAULT 'music',
  `is_public` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `play_count` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `is_favorited` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `metadata` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `entertainment_user_preferences` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `preferred_genres` JSON,
  `preferred_artists` JSON,
  `preferred_types` JSON,
  `notifications_enabled` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `auto_play_enabled` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `quality_preference` ENUM('low','medium','high','lossless') DEFAULT 'high',
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
